import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { MapPin, Star, Shield, Award } from 'lucide-react'; import Footer from '../components/Footer'; const About = () => { return (

About StayIndia

We believe that true luxury lies in the experience. StayIndia was founded with a singular vision: to curate the finest heritage properties, boutique hotels, and luxury resorts across the Indian subcontinent.

Our Heritage

India is a land of stories, where every fort and palace has a tale to tell. We handpick stays that not only offer unparalleled comfort but also preserve the cultural and historical legacy of their surroundings. From the royal grandeur of Rajasthan to the tranquil backwaters of Kerala, our properties are a gateway to India's soul.

50+

Curated Destinations

9.8/10

Average Review Score

100%

Secure Bookings

Top 1%

Hospitality Awards
); }; export default About;

import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { ShieldAlert, Clock, CreditCard, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'; import Footer from '../components/Footer'; const BookingPolicy = () => { return (
{/* Header */}

Booking & Cancellation Policy

Transparent guidelines to ensure your luxury experience with StayIndia is seamless from reservation to checkout.

{/* Section 1 */}

Check-in & Check-out

Our standard timings are designed to allow rigorous preparation of our premium suites between stays:

  • Check-in time: 2:00 PM (14:00 hours) IST
  • Check-out time: 11:00 AM (11:00 hours) IST

*Early check-in and late check-out are subject to availability. Platinum members receive guaranteed 4PM late check-out.

{/* Section 2 */}

Payment Terms

To confirm a reservation at any StayIndia property, valid payment details must be provided at the time of booking.

Standard Rates

A 50% deposit is charged at the time of booking. The remaining balance will be charged 7 days prior to arrival.

Non-Refundable Rates

Full prepayment is required at the time of booking. This rate offers the maximum discount but cannot be refunded.

{/* Section 3 */}

Cancellation & Refunds

Standard Stay Policy

  • Up to 14 days before arrival 100% Refund
  • 13 to 7 days before arrival 50% Refund
  • Less than 7 days / No-show No Refund

Refunds for valid cancellations will be processed to the original form of payment within 5-7 business days. In cases of force majeure (such as pandemic lockdowns or natural disasters), StayIndia will provide a full credit voucher valid for 18 months, regardless of the rate booked.

Have specific questions regarding a current booking?

Contact our Reservations Team
); }; export default BookingPolicy;

; return (

) : (
{bookings.map((booking) => (
{booking.status}

{booking.flat?.title || `Flat ${booking.flat?.flatNumber}`}

{booking.flat?.tower?.name}, India

 ))}
)}

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import axiosClient from '../api/axiosClient'; import { Star, Heart, Map, Grid, List, ChevronRight, Waves, Flower2, Dumbbell, Wifi, MapPin } from 'lucide-react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { getRandomHeritageImage } from '../utils/images'; const Flats = () => { const [flats, setFlats] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); // Filter states (mock for UI) const [amenities, setAmenities] = useState({ pool: false, spa: false, gym: false, wifi: true }); const [propertyTypes, setPropertyTypes] = useState({ boutique: true, heritage: false, resort: false }); useEffect(() => { fetchFlats(); }, []); const fetchFlats = async () => { try { const res = await axiosClient.get('/flats'); setFlats(res.data.data); setLoading(false); } catch { // Create some beautiful mock data if no backend connection const mockData = Array(6).fill(0).map((_, i) => ({ _id: `mock-${i}`, title: i % 2 === 0 ? 'The Oberoi Amarvilas' : 'Taj Lake Palace', location: i % 2 === 0 ? 'Agra, Uttar Pradesh' : 'Udaipur, Rajasthan', rent: i % 2 === 0 ? 35000 : 48000, rating: 4.9, type: i % 2 === 0 ? 'HERITAGE' : 'RESORT', tags: i % 2 === 0 ? ['TAJ VIEW', 'AWARD-WINNING SPA'] : ['LAKE VIEW', 'PRIVATE BOAT'] })); setFlats(mockData); setLoading(false); } }; const toggleAmenity = (key) => setAmenities(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] })); const togglePropertyType = (key) => setPropertyTypes(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] })); return (
{/* Header Breadcrumb & Title */}
Home > All Properties

Explore All Stays

Discover a curated collection of premium hotels and luxury resorts across India's most iconic destinations. From Himalayan retreats to coastal palaces.

{/* Sidebar Filters */}

Filters

{/* Price Range */}

Price per night

₹5,000 ₹50,000+
{/* Property Type */}

Property Type

{/* Amenities Grid */}

Amenities

toggleAmenity('pool')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.pool ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Pool
toggleAmenity('spa')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.spa ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Spa
toggleAmenity('gym')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.gym ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Gym
toggleAmenity('wifi')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.wifi ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Wifi
{/* Popular Regions */}

Popular Regions

{/* Right Content Area */}
{/* Top Toolbar */}
Sort by:
{/* Flats Grid */} {loading ? (
{[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map(n => (
))}
) : (
{flats.map((flat, index) => (
{flat.type || (index % 3 === 0 ? 'BOUTIQUE' : index % 2 === 0 ? 'HERITAGE' : 'RESORT')}

{flat.title || "Luxury Retreat"}

{parseFloat(flat.rating || 4.9).toFixed(1)}
{flat.location || 'Jaipur, Rajasthan'}
{(flat.tags || ['INFINITY POOL', 'FINE DINING']).map(tag => ( {tag} ))}
₹{flat.rent ? flat.rent.toLocaleString() : '25,000'} / night
))}
)}
); }; export default Flats;

import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Gift, Sparkles, Send, MapPin } from 'lucide-react'; import Footer from '../components/Footer'; const GiftVouchers = () => { return (
Give the Gift of Luxury

StayIndia
Gift Vouchers

Whether it's a honeymoon, anniversary, or a simple retreat, the StayIndia experience is the ultimate gift. Valid across our entire portfolio of heritage palaces and luxury resorts.

{/* Decorative background glow */}
{/* Actual Card Graphic */}
StayIndia
E-Gift Card

Digital Value

₹50,000

{/* Simulated Chip/Pattern */}
{/* Features */}

Instant Delivery

Delivered directly to the recipient's email inbox within seconds, beautifully formatted with a personalized message.

No Restrictive Blackouts

Vouchers can be used against any property across our 50+ destinations, including during peak holiday seasons.

3-Year Validity

Plenty of time to plan the perfect getaway. Our e-Gift cards remain valid for 36 months from the date of issue.

{/* How to use */}

How to Redeem

Select your destination, choose your dates, and proceed to checkout. Add the unique 16-digit voucher PIN in the "Payments" section to instantly deduct the balance.

Explore Destinations >
); }; export default GiftVouchers;

Book your winter stay 90 days in advance and save 25% on luxury mountain suites.', date: 'Valid thru Dec 15, 2026', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1455587734955-081b22074882?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Claim Offer' }, { id: 3, tag: 'BANK PARTNER', title: 'HDFC Bank Exclusive', desc: 'Get an additional 10% instant discount + 5x Reward Points when you pay with HDFC Bank Credit Cards.', code: 'STAYHDFC10', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556742049-0cfed4f6a45d?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Apply Code' }, { id: 4, tag: 'EXPERIENCE', title: 'Royal Spa Package', desc: 'Book a 3-night stay at any Royal Heritage property and receive a complimentary 90-minute Ayurvedic spa session for two.', status: 'Active', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600334089648-b0d9d3028eb2?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Book Now' }, { id: 5, tag: 'GOLD & PLATINUM', title: 'Members-Only Breakfast', desc: 'Enjoy complimentary gourmet breakfast and airport transfers on all bookings made directly through our app.', status: 'Permanent Offer', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1533089860892-a7c6f0a88666?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Join Now' }, { id: 6, tag: 'ROMANCE', title: 'Weekday Honeymoon Special', desc: 'Celebrate your love with a midweek getaway. 20% off room rates plus a bottle of premium wine on arrival.', date: 'Valid Thru Oct 31, 2026', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517436073-3b1b13d29a65?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', // Romantic wine context btn: 'Claim Offer' }, { id: 7, tag: 'PREMIUM PARTNER', title: 'Amex Platinum Escapes', desc: 'Exclusive 15% discount for American Express Platinum Cardholders on all beachfront properties.', code: 'AMEXPLATI15', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550136513-548af4445338?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Apply Code' } ]; return (

{offer.tag}

))}

Offer Terms & Information

  • • Bank offers cannot be combined with seasonal or member-exclusive discounts unless specified.
  • • Blackout dates may apply during peak holidays and festival seasons.

import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Leaf, Droplets, Sun, Recycle } from 'lucide-react'; import Footer from '../components/Footer'; const Sustainability = () => { return (
{/* Hero */}

Sustainable Tourism

Preserving India's heritage and natural beauty for generations to come.

Our Commitment to Earth

At StayIndia, we recognize that our operations have an impact on the environment and local communities. We are committed to achieving net-zero emissions by 2035 and ensuring that 100% of our partner properties adhere to strict sustainable guidelines.

From eliminating single-use plastics in our heritage resorts to deeply integrating local sourcing of food and materials, every booking with StayIndia contributes to local conservation efforts and community empowerment.

Water Conservation

Rainwater harvesting and smart recycling systems in 80% properties.

Solar Energy

Over 35% of our remote resorts run entirely on solar power grids.

Zero Plastic

Glass bottles and biodegradable alternatives across all room amenities.

Local Sourcing

Farm-to-table dining experiences supporting local agriculture.

{/* Eco-Friendly Stays Banner */}

Explore Our Eco-Friendly Collection

Discover stays that give back to the planet. Find eco-resorts nestled in nature that operate with minimal carbon footprint.

); }; export default Sustainability;
